creator: freebsd@marino.st
text:
devel/llvm is now broken since the LIT option was added and turned on by default.  The cause appears to be set of bad plist entries.  (Was this change tested in a stage capable jail?)

LOG EXCERPT
==========================================================================
install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/llvm-3.3.src/utils/lit/lit.py  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/lit
ln -f /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/lit  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/llvm-lit
ln -f /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/lit  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/bin/lit33
ln -f /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/lit  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/bin/llvm-lit33
/bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/lit33
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/llvm-3.3.src/utils/lit/lit/*.py  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/lit33
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/llvm-3.3.src/Release/bin/FileCheck  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/
ln -f /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/llvm33/bin/FileCheck  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/bin/FileCheck33
for man in lit.1 bugpoint.1 llc.1 lli.1 llvm-ar.1 llvm-as.1  llvm-bcanalyzer.1 llvm-config.1 llvm-cov.1 llvm-diff.1  llvm-dis.1 llvm-extract.1 llvm-link.1 llvm-nm.1  llvm-prof.1 llvm-ranlib.1 llvm-stress.1 opt.1 tblgen.1; do  install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/llvm-3.3.src/docs/_build/man/${man}  /wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/${man%.1}33.1 ;  done
====> Compressing man pages
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for llvm33-3.3_5
pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/llvm33bin/lit): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/llvm33bin/llvm-lit): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/devel/llvm33/work/stage/llvm33bin/FileCheck): No such file or directory
pkg-static: fread(): Invalid argument
*** Error code 1
==========================================================================

Here is part of the added plist:
=========================================
%%LIT%%bin/lit33
%%LIT%%/llvm33bin/lit
%%LIT%%bin/llvm-lit33
%%LIT%%/llvm33bin/llvm-lit
%%LIT%%bin/FileCheck33
%%LIT%%/llvm33bin/FileCheck
=========================================

It appears that the 3 problematic entries are the same ones without slashes.

Fix: 

fix the plist entries
